description: Style NoteLook chic and feel comfortable in this black top from arrow woman. The knit cotton adds a touch of warmth, while the fabric feels soft on the skin and keeps you comfortable all day long. Team this with a pair of jeans and high heels.Product DetailsBlack knit top, has cap sleeves with ribbed cuffs, frills at the neckine and placket with shell buttonsMaterial and CareCotton with lycraMachine wash cold and use mild detergentDo not bleach or wringLow iron if neededTumble dry or flat dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
